CONTENT.Honours: BATE BorisovBelarusian Premier League champion: 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018Belarusian Cup winner: 2014–15, 2020–21Belarusian Super Cup winner: 2014FerencvárosNemzeti Bajnokság I champion: 2018–19
CONTENT.Club career: On 8 September 2020, he signed with Russian Premier League club FC Khimki.On 28 September 2020, he returned to BATE Borisov.On 16 June 2020, he became champion with Ferencváros by beating Budapest Honvéd FC at the Hidegkuti Nándor Stadion on the 30th match day of the 2019–20 Nemzeti Bajnokság I season.
CONTENT.External links: Nikolay Signevich at SoccerwayNikolay Signevich at FootballFacts.ru (in Russian)Profile at Dinamo Brest website
CONTENT.International goal: Scores and results list Belarus' goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: Signevich made his debut for the senior national side of his country on 15 November 2014, in the away match against Spain in a UEFA Euro 2016 qualifier, coming on as a second-half substitute for Sergei Kornilenko.

SUMMARY: Nikolay Yevgenyevich Signevich (Belarusian: Мікалай Яўгенавіч Сігневіч; Russian: Николай Евгеньевич Сигневич; born 20 February 1992) is a Belarusian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Atyrau.
